```python
def main():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    n = len(S)
    if n == 0:
        print("")
        return

    # Compute prefix function for KMP algorithm
    prefix = [0] * n
    for i in range(1, n):
        j = prefix[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and S[i] != S[j]:
            j = prefix[j - 1]
        if S[i] == S[j]:
            j += 1
        prefix[i] = j

    l = prefix[n - 1]
    # Append reverse of the substring not part of the longest prefix-suffix match
    result = S + S[:n - l - 1][::-1]
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
